cmd:
sed -i '/const current = await client.get(COUNTER_KEY);/c\
  const newValue = await client.incr(COUNTER_KEY);' app/counter.js

sed -i '/const value = parseInt(current || \"0\", 10);/d' app/counter.js && sed -i '/logger.debug(`Counter incremented: ${value} -> ${newValue}`);/c\
  logger.debug(`Counter incremented to ${newValue}`);' app/counter.js
sed -i '/await client.set(COUNTER_KEY, newValue.toString());/d' app/counter.js && cat app/counter.js
sed -i '/const newValue = value + 1;/d' app/counter.js && sed -i 's/const newValue = await client.incr(COUNTER_KEY);/let newValue = await client.incr(COUNTER_KEY);/' app/counter.js
